languages.text: "Простите, Ваша Светлость! Погонщица, гадина... Спасибо, что вразумили!"
languages.translation_comment:
Меровец 2 (ж)
SC_ZarkovWoman_Name
Остальные чуваки, включая мужика, расходятся.

Меровец 2 (ж)
SC_ZarkovWoman_Name
Остальные чуваки, включая мужика, расходятся.

languages.text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"
languages.original_text: "Простите, Ваша Светлость! Погонщица, гадина... Спасибо, что вразумили!"

traits.locale_text: "Forgive me, Your Lordship! The Drover, the vile creature... Thank you for talking sense into me!"
"Forgive me, Your Lordship! The Drover, the vile creature... Thank you for talking sense into me!"
"Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"
"Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

languages.text: “请原谅我，大人！都是因为那拒生花，那该死的畜生……谢谢您，让我清醒过来！”
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: “请原谅我，大人！都是因为那拒生花，那该死的畜生……谢谢您，让我清醒过来！”

languages.text: "Beni affedin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Çoban, o iğrenç yaratık... Beni kendime getirdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim!"
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: "Beni affedin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Çoban, o iğrenç yaratık... Beni kendime getirdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim!"

languages.text: « Pardonnez-moi, Votre Seigneurie ! C'est le Chasseur, cette vile créature... Merci de m'avoir ramenée à la raison ! »
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: « Pardonnez-moi, Votre Seigneurie ! C'est le Chasseur, cette vile créature... Merci de m'avoir ramenée à la raison ! »

languages.text: «¡Discúlpeme, mi{mf|lord|lady}! El Pastor, esa vil criatura... ¡Gracias por devolverme la cordura!».
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Discúlpeme, mi{mf|lord|lady}! El Pastor, esa vil criatura... ¡Gracias por devolverme la cordura!».

languages.text: "Vergebt mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Der Treiber, diese widerliche Kreatur ... Danke, dass Ihr mich zur Besinnung gebracht habt!"
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: "Vergebt mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Der Treiber, diese widerliche Kreatur ... Danke, dass Ihr mich zur Besinnung gebracht habt!"

languages.text: 「許してください、御{mf|殿|女}様！あの悪党、ドルーバー…私を正気に戻してくださり、ありがとうございます！」
languages.original_text: "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Drover, that vile creature... Thank you for bringing me to my senses!"

traits.locale_text: 「許してください、御{mf|殿|女}様！あの悪党、ドルーバー…私を正気に戻してくださり、ありがとうございます！」
